name: max_subarray
description: Return the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray (Kadane's algorithm).
mojo_reference:
fn max_subarray(nums: List[Int]) -> Int:
    var max_sum = nums[0]
    var cur = nums[0]
    for i in range(1, len(nums)):
        cur = max(nums[i], cur + nums[i])
        max_sum = max(max_sum, cur)
    return max_sum
